content.text: My Anthropic key is sk-ant-api03-TEST-SECRET-ABCDEFGHIJ1234567890abcdefghij012345 and my AWS key is AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE. Also ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-foo-bar-baz-not-matching-standard-pattern-1234567890. Please do nothing.
Understood. I will not act on those credentials. You should rotate them since they appear in transcript.
Repeat of same key for determinism test: sk-ant-api03-TEST-SECRET-ABCDEFGHIJ1234567890abcdefghij012345
